datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.subtitle: Information on data protection according to GDPR
datenschutz.introText: The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit our website. Personal data is any data that can be used to personally identify you.
datenschutz.responsibleText: The responsible party for data processing on this website is:
datenschutz.collectionTitle: 3. Collection and Storage of Personal Data
datenschutz.collectionText: When you visit our website, information of a general nature is automatically collected. This information (server log files) includes the type of web browser, the operating system used, the domain name of your Internet service provider, and similar. This is exclusively information that does not allow any conclusions about your person.
datenschutz.cookiesText: Our website uses cookies. These are small text files that your web browser stores on your device. Cookies help us make our website more user-friendly, effective, and secure. Some cookies are "session cookies." Such cookies are automatically deleted after your browser session ends. Other cookies remain on your device until you delete them yourself. Such cookies help us recognize you when you return to our website.
datenschutz.contactFormText: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the inquiry form, including the contact details you provided there, are stored by us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We do not share this data without your consent.
datenschutz.analyticsText: When you visit our website, your browsing behavior may be statistically analyzed. This is done primarily with cookies and with so-called analytics programs. The analysis of your browsing behavior is usually anonymous; the browsing behavior cannot be traced back to you.
datenschutz.rightsText: You have the right to receive information about the origin, recipients, and purpose of your stored personal data free of charge at any time. You also have the right to request the correction, blocking, or deletion of this data. You can contact us at any time regarding this and other questions on the subject of data protection.
datenschutz.rightsListTitle: You have the following rights in particular:
datenschutz.rightRestriction: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
datenschutz.sslText: For security reasons and to protect the transmission of confidential content, this site uses SSL/TLS encryption. You can recognize an encrypted connection by the browser address line changing from "http://" to "https://" and the lock symbol in your browser line.

agb.title: Terms and Conditions
agb.subtitle: General Terms and Conditions of Wgroup GmbH
agb.scopeText: These General Terms and Conditions (hereinafter "GTC") apply to all business relationships between Wgroup GmbH, Trappenpfad 33, 12351 Berlin (hereinafter "Provider") and the customer (hereinafter "Customer"). The version valid at the time of conclusion of the contract shall apply.
agb.contractText: The presentation of services on our website does not constitute a legally binding offer, but rather an invitation to submit an offer. The contract is concluded through the acceptance of the offer by the Provider.
agb.servicesText: The scope of services is determined by the respective service description at the time of ordering. Wgroup GmbH offers consulting, training, and software solutions in the automotive industry and quality assurance sector.
agb.pricesText: All stated prices are net prices plus the applicable statutory value-added tax. Payments are due within 14 days of invoicing without deduction.
agb.liabilityText: The Provider is liable without limitation for intent and gross negligence. For slight negligence, the Provider is only liable for breach of a material contractual obligation. In this case, liability is limited to the foreseeable, contract-typical damage.
agb.dataProtectionText: The Provider processes the customer's personal data in accordance with applicable data protection laws. For details, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
agb.finalText: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies. The place of jurisdiction for all disputes is Berlin, provided the customer is a merchant, a legal entity under public law, or a special fund under public law.
agb.severabilityText: Should individual provisions of these GTC be or become invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall remain unaffected. In place of the invalid provision, the valid provision that comes closest to the economic purpose of the invalid provision shall be deemed agreed.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.subtitle: Information about our use of cookies
cookiePolicy.whatText: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device by websites when you visit them. They are widely used to make websites work or work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to website operators.
cookiePolicy.whichText: We use different types of cookies on our website:
cookiePolicy.necessaryText: These cookies are essential for the basic functions of the website. They enable basic functionalities such as page navigation and access to secure areas of the website. This includes the language preference cookie that stores your preferred language.
cookiePolicy.analyticsText: These cookies allow us to count how many visitors use our website and how they navigate through our website. This helps us improve the way our website works.
cookiePolicy.manageText: You can set your browser to block all cookies or to notify you when a cookie is being set. Please note that some parts of our website may not function properly if you disable cookies.
cookiePolicy.manageBrowsers: Most web browsers allow some control of cookies through browser settings. For more information about cookies, including how to see which cookies have been set and how you can manage and delete them, please visit your browser's help pages.
cookiePolicy.contactText: If you have questions about our cookie policy, please contact us at:

wqualityPage.title: W-
wqualityPage.subtitle: Industrial Consulting & Audit for Automotive and Manufacturing.
wqualityPage.intro: WQuality supports organizations in building robust quality systems, improving operational performance and preparing for complex industry audits.
wqualityPage.whatWeDo1: WQuality provides consulting expertise for organizations operating in automotive and manufacturing industries.
wqualityPage.whatWeDo2: Our focus is to strengthen quality systems, improve supplier performance and support organizations in navigating complex industry requirements.
wqualityPage.whatWeDo3: By combining industry experience with structured methodologies, WQuality helps organizations build sustainable operational excellence.
wqualityPage.approach1: WQuality believes that sustainable performance is built on strong systems and clear processes.
wqualityPage.approach2: Our approach combines industry experience, analytical thinking and structured methodologies to support organizations in building resilient operational systems.
wqualityPage.approach3: By focusing on practical solutions and measurable results, WQuality helps organizations strengthen both performance and compliance.
wqualityPage.ctaDesc: Discover how WQuality can support your organization in building sustainable quality systems and operational excellence.

wdigilabPage.title: W-
wdigilabPage.subtitle: Digital Systems and Intelligent Solutions for Modern Industry.
wdigilabPage.intro: WDigiLab develops digital tools, intelligent workflows and AI-supported systems that help organizations transform complex industrial processes into efficient, scalable and data-driven environments.
wdigilabPage.whatWeDo1: WDigiLab focuses on the digital transformation of industrial processes. By combining industry expertise with intelligent software solutions, WDigiLab helps organizations structure operational knowledge, digitize workflows and implement scalable digital systems.
wdigilabPage.whatWeDo2: Our mission is to turn complex industrial operations into transparent, efficient and intelligent environments where data and processes work together.
wdigilabPage.approach1: WDigiLab believes digital transformation is not only about technology but about structuring knowledge and processes in a way that enables organizations to operate more intelligently.
wdigilabPage.approach2: Our approach combines industry insight, system thinking and digital innovation to develop practical and scalable solutions for modern industrial environments.
wdigilabPage.ctaDesc: Discover how WDigiLab can help your organization transform industrial processes into intelligent, scalable digital systems.

wstudioPage.title: W-
wstudioPage.subtitle: Industry Media, AI Content Production and Knowledge Platforms.
wstudioPage.intro: WStudio is the creative media and AI content division of WGroup focused on transforming complex industry knowledge into engaging media formats and scalable digital knowledge platforms. By combining industrial expertise, media production and intelligent technologies, WStudio develops new ways of communicating knowledge across the modern industrial world.
wstudioPage.whatWeDo1: WStudio develops modern media formats for industry knowledge. By combining AI-supported production, creative media and industrial expertise, WStudio enables complex industrial topics to be communicated through engaging and accessible formats.
wstudioPage.whatWeDo2: From industry shows to digital knowledge platforms, WStudio explores new approaches to sharing expertise across modern organizations.
wstudioPage.approach1: WStudio believes that knowledge becomes more powerful when it is communicated through engaging formats and accessible media experiences.
wstudioPage.approach2: By merging industrial expertise with creative media production and intelligent technologies, WStudio develops platforms where knowledge can be experienced, shared and scaled across industries.
wstudioPage.ctaDesc: Discover how WStudio can help transform your industry expertise into engaging media experiences and scalable knowledge platforms.

wproducts.ctaTitle: Let's design a tailored solution for your company
wproducts.ctaDesc: Talk to our team, we'll adapt the product to your operations.

smartOperationalPlatform.title: Smart Operational Excellence Platform
smartOperationalPlatform.tagline: A modular operating platform under a single digital roof
smartOperationalPlatform.definition: A modular operating platform that runs all operational processes of the company, from workflows to audits, from supplier management to production planning, under a single digital roof. It transfers processes running on paper forms, Excel files, and email approvals into digital modules with role-based approval flows and AI-driven validation. These modules feed data to each other, forming a shared operational data source.
smartOperationalPlatform.strategicAdvantage: Logs every process step with timestamp, user ID, and approval chain, creating end-to-end traceability. An audit finding automatically triggers the CAPA flow; a CAPA action feeds back into the related workflow; a supplier-originated finding is posted to the supplier risk score. Because modules work together, the same data is never entered twice; operational signals (form quality, completion time) automatically update the competency matrix. Evidence files required in IATF, VDA, and CSR audits are generated in 1-2 clicks.

useCases.title: Digital Workflows
useCases.desc: 8D and Ishikawa-based Customer Complaint Management, CAPA, MOC (Management of Change) approval chains, Layered Process Audit (LPA), and field non-conformance reporting.

useCases.title: Internal Audit & Governance
useCases.desc: Annual audit program management; system, process, and product audits; CSR and 2nd party supplier audits; dynamic VDA 6.3 and IATF 16949 checklists.

useCases.title: Supplier Risk & Performance
useCases.desc: Live risk score (PPM, OTD, financial, logistic, geographic), scorecard management, auto-launched development plans, and 2nd party audit triggering.

useCases.title: Intelligent Production Scheduling
useCases.desc: Dynamic scheduling that jointly optimizes machine capacity, raw material, shifts, and lead times; "What-If" scenarios and MES/SCADA integration.

useCases.title: Competency & Backup
useCases.desc: Objective ILU matrix fed by digital workflow data; certificate validity tracking; automated backup alerts for critical positions.

intelligencePerformancePlatform.title: Intelligence & Performance Platform
intelligencePerformancePlatform.tagline: A predictive decision layer serving three decision tiers
intelligencePerformancePlatform.definition: A knowledge and decision-support layer that processes data from the operational platform, shop floor sensors, corporate documentation, and KPI systems through AI. It combines two core capabilities: (1) a corporate knowledge base searchable in natural language (RAG-based), and (2) a predictive performance and command dashboard serving three decision layers simultaneously, shift supervisor, department manager, and executive leadership.
intelligencePerformancePlatform.strategicAdvantage: Makes corporate memory independent of individuals: captures the senior engineer's implicit "why do we do it this way" knowledge into documents and Q&A logs; the system answers only from the current document revision and automatically excludes outdated versions. On the performance side, real-time data is presented to line managers, weekly trends to department heads, and long-term KPI trajectories plus strategic investment ROI to executive leadership. As a result, a machine failure, an audit finding, or a KPI deviation simultaneously triggers both operational actions and strategic decisions.

useCases.title: AI-Powered Knowledge Querying (RAG)
useCases.desc: Natural language search across technical standards, procedures, 8D logs, and solution archives; answer generation with source references.

useCases.title: Predictive Performance & Command Dashboard
useCases.desc: IATF/QMS compliance scoring, OEE, energy consumption, machine downtime alerts; department- and plant-level KPI dashboards.

useCases.title: Strategic Governance
useCases.desc: OKR/BSC-based goal deployment, 3-6-12-month trend analyses, strategic investment ROI and progress tracking.

useCases.title: Integrated Training
useCases.desc: Interactive onboarding connected with WStudio video content; digitalization of engineering know-how through structured Q&A sets.

useCases.title: Automated Alerting & Escalation
useCases.desc: Instant notifications when thresholds are breached; automated CAPA triggering upon non-conformance detection.

blockchainProducts.title: Blockchain Products
blockchainProducts.tagline: Tokenization, DAO governance, and smart contracts
blockchainProducts.definition: Consolidates the three areas where blockchain technology generates the most direct value in the corporate world into a single product family: tokenization of assets and value, decentralized governance (DAO) systems, and business rules executed automatically via smart contracts. A modular solution suite that enables companies to integrate these tools into their own structures in a controlled way. Operates independently of the Operational Platform (01) and the Intelligence Platform (02); has its own business logic and economic model.
blockchainProducts.strategicAdvantage: Activates in scenarios where trusting a central authority or a single system is not sufficient. An investment decision can be made through tokenized voting; an incentive program can be distributed as tokens; a collaboration agreement can be encoded as a self-executing smart contract. Because decision and transaction history is recorded on-chain immutably, it eliminates the trust gap, particularly in multi-party structures (joint ventures, consortia, supplier networks), and shortens manual approval loops and intermediate trust layers.

useCases.title: Asset & Value Tokenization
useCases.desc: Converting factory equipment, inventory, intellectual property, and financial assets into tokens on the blockchain; enables fractional ownership, secondary markets, and automated transfers.

useCases.title: DAO-Based Corporate Governance
useCases.desc: Critical decisions (investment approval, budget allocation, strategic direction) made through tokenized voting rights; decision history and voting distribution recorded on-chain, transparent and immutable.

useCases.title: Smart Contracts
useCases.desc: Conditional transactions such as payments, deliveries, progress payments, and bonuses encoded and automatically triggered when conditions are met; shortens or eliminates the manual approval loop.

useCases.title: Multi-Party Collaboration
useCases.desc: Decentralized decision ledgers for joint ventures, supplier consortia, or industry alliances; shared governance where no single party can unilaterally manipulate outcomes.

useCases.title: Token-Based Incentives
useCases.desc: Distribution of measurable value as tokens across areas such as employee performance, supplier success, or customer loyalty, usable within the ecosystem.

useCases.title: Decentralized Identity (DID)
useCases.desc: Managing user identities and access rights through distributed identity systems rather than centralized databases; secure and portable authentication across companies.

systemArchitectureCompliance.title: System Architecture, Operational Excellence and Compliance Assurance
systemArchitectureCompliance.tagline: A living quality architecture, audit-ready at all times
systemArchitectureCompliance.definition: Rebuilds the organization's Quality Management System (QMS) not as a certificate-compliance formality, but as a living architecture that disciplines daily operations and keeps the company audit-ready at all times. Processes, responsibilities, measurement points, and approval flows are aligned with standards such as ISO 9001 and IATF 16949, with customer-specific requirements (CSR), and with process audit demands like VDA 6.3, yet engineered for the company's actual business logic. QMS implementation and audit readiness are treated not as two separate projects, but as two faces of the same discipline.
systemArchitectureCompliance.strategicAdvantage: Directly targets the Cost of Quality (COQ: rejects, rework, warranty, complaints) and moves 3rd-party audits out of the "stress event" category. Transfers processes from the founding team's memory into documented, measurable, and transferable form, preserving institutional continuity during growth inflection points such as new plant openings, M&A integration, or OEM customer onboarding. With the "Zero Critical Finding" objective, keeps certificate validity and market access continuously under a legal and technical shield; proactively tracks regulatory changes (UNECE, REACH, ESG reporting) to close compliance gaps before they open.

useCases.title: QMS Implementation & Certification
useCases.desc: QMS Implementation, Optimization, and ISO/IATF Certification Preparation.

useCases.title: IATF 16949 Compliance
useCases.desc: Compliance and Transition Program (gap analysis, action plan, audit coaching).

useCases.title: Process Mapping & KPI
useCases.desc: Process Mapping (SIPOC, turtle charts), Bottleneck Analysis, and KPI Design.

useCases.title: Multi-site Standardization
useCases.desc: Global Standards Roll-out (HQ to local plants) and Multi-site Standardization.

useCases.title: Gap Analysis & Mock Audits
useCases.desc: Gap Analysis and Mock Audits for System, Process, and Product Audits.

useCases.title: VDA 6.3 & CSR Integration
useCases.desc: VDA 6.3 Process Audit Preparation and CSR Integration into the Audit Program.

useCases.title: Regulatory Compliance
useCases.desc: Legal and Technical Regulation Compliance Consulting (UNECE, REACH, ESG).

useCases.title: Internal Auditor Development
useCases.desc: Internal Auditor Capability Development and Qualification Programs.

strategicSupplierDevelopment.title: Strategic Supplier Development Ecosystem
strategicSupplierDevelopment.tagline: Turn suppliers from cost items into strategic partners
strategicSupplierDevelopment.definition: A combined on-site and desk-based program that transforms suppliers from monitored cost items into partners who speak the OEM's technical language and contribute to shared goals. The program engages the supplier's own processes to produce a product- and process-specific development roadmap and tracks it to closure.
strategicSupplierDevelopment.strategicAdvantage: Resolves supplier-originated quality problems (incoming rejects, line stoppages, customer recalls) at the source. Detects capacity and quality risks early in critical parts or processes, preventing crises before they unfold, and strengthens the OEM's market position by proving supply chain maturity under customer audits.

useCases.title: Performance Improvement
useCases.desc: Supplier Performance Improvement Projects (PPM, OTD, logistics).

useCases.title: New Supplier Onboarding
useCases.desc: Sourcing, PPAP preparation, and APQP support for new supplier onboarding.

useCases.title: On-site Technical Development
useCases.desc: On-site Technical Development and Capacity Building on Critical Parts or Processes.

useCases.title: Supplier Quality Coaching
useCases.desc: Coaching and Capability Transfer for Supplier Quality Managers.

strategicPerformanceManagement.title: Strategic Performance Management and Corporate Alignment
strategicPerformanceManagement.tagline: Management infrastructure that connects strategy to shop floor
strategicPerformanceManagement.definition: Builds the management infrastructure that connects executive strategic objectives to shop floor reality, eliminates inter-departmental gaps, and makes decision mechanisms data-driven. Combines policy deployment, OKR or BSC frameworks, and visual management to translate strategy into a shared language across every level.
strategicPerformanceManagement.strategicAdvantage: Closes the gap between strategic plan and operational execution, accelerating decision-making. Departmental KPI sets, executive dashboards, and a regular review cadence prioritize resource allocation; solves the "too many goals, too little focus" problem by concentrating organizational momentum on 3-5 key objectives.

useCases.title: Command Center Design
useCases.desc: Corporate Command and Decision Center Design (dashboard architecture, review cadence).

useCases.title: Cross-Functional Alignment
useCases.desc: Cross-Functional Goal Alignment (OKR or BSC deployment).

useCases.title: Strategic Project Governance
useCases.desc: Strategic Transformation Project Governance (new product, site, or technology integrations).

useCases.title: Decision Hygiene & Ritual
useCases.desc: Decision Hygiene and Ritual Design for Executive Teams (weekly, monthly, quarterly).

aiContentProduction.title: AI-Driven Content Production and Business Storytelling
aiContentProduction.tagline: Cinematic storytelling meets AI video production
aiContentProduction.definition: An end-to-end media production service that combines an AI-powered video production infrastructure with the discipline of cinematic storytelling, helping companies translate their knowledge, experience, and success stories into modern video formats. We convert complex business processes, technical know-how, and leadership insights into watchable, shareable, and memorable content. AI tools deliver speed and scale; storytelling ensures recall and emotional impact.
aiContentProduction.strategicAdvantage: Breaks through the time and budget bottleneck of traditional corporate video production: AI avatar presenters and automated voice-over generate multilingual content from a single shoot, while the storytelling framework turns content from dry information transfer into a story that is watched, shared, and remembered. The result: internal know-how and external reputation stories become scalable media assets, produced to brand standards and ready for international audiences.

useCases.title: AI Video Production
useCases.desc: AI-powered production pipeline from scripting to post-production; minimum shoot, maximum output.

useCases.title: AI Avatar Presenters
useCases.desc: Multilingual digital presenters acting as company spokespeople or trainers without the need for human on-camera talent.

useCases.title: Multilingual Content Creation
useCases.desc: Automated localization from a single master source into English, German, Turkish, and any additional required language.

useCases.title: Automated Storytelling
useCases.desc: AI-driven narrative formats that transform raw data or documents into structured story arcs.

useCases.title: Company Stories
useCases.desc: Cinematic storytelling of the company's founding, transformation, or cultural journey.

useCases.title: Innovation Stories
useCases.desc: Documentary-style presentation of R&D projects, patent journeys, and technological breakthroughs.

useCases.title: Leadership Insights
useCases.desc: First-person delivery of executive vision, strategic decisions, and industry perspective.

useCases.title: Industry Documentaries
useCases.desc: Corporate documentaries covering industry transformations, supply chain narratives, or competitive dynamics.

businessflix.title: BusinessFlix: Corporate Content in Show and Series Format
businessflix.tagline: Not a training video, a broadcast experience
businessflix.definition: A premium content production service that takes knowledge and experience out of the classic training or promotional formats and turns them into a real show or mini-series experience. Corporate topics (quality, audit, supplier development, talent management) are structured into seasons with characters, tension, and dramatic arcs. The content is not a training video; it is a broadcast experience produced to be watched.
businessflix.strategicAdvantage: Solves the biggest problem in corporate training and cultural content: low completion rates and zero lasting impact. Because the audience feels they are watching a show or series, content is consumed voluntarily, discussed socially, and rewatched. Topics such as audit pressure in automotive, supplier crises, or quality leadership, when told through characters and story, generate an unforgettable brand experience for both employees and external stakeholders.

useCases.title: Audit Drama
useCases.desc: A training series that reconstructs audit processes through scenes, in a watchable tension-driven format.

useCases.title: Supplier Development Stories
useCases.desc: Character-driven documentary storytelling of supplier development journeys from the field.

useCases.title: Quality Queen Show
useCases.desc: A series featuring quality leaders, delivering mentorship and case discussions in a show format.

useCases.title: Industry Mini Series
useCases.desc: A multi-episode mini-series format designed to make industry topics watchable rather than instructional.

useCases.title: Talent Development Series
useCases.desc: Capability growth, career journeys, and internal mentorship stories presented in series format.

corporateKnowledgeChannels.title: Corporate Knowledge Channels
corporateKnowledgeChannels.definition: A service that designs and operates branded, sustainable knowledge channels for employees, suppliers, and business partners. Not a one-off video production, but a functioning corporate media channel with a publishing schedule, editorial curation, and subscription experience. Positioned as an internal learning, supplier development, onboarding, or external storytelling channel depending on audience and purpose.
corporateKnowledgeChannels.strategicAdvantage: Transforms corporate communication, training, and onboarding from scattered video files or PDF documentation into a consistent, searchable, brand-standard channel experience. Employees access content with Netflix- or Spotify-like ease; suppliers follow their development content from a single place; new joiners learn the company through a structured feed in their first weeks. Knowledge, once produced, is not lost; thanks to the channel, it grows over time into an evolving corporate media library.

useCases.title: Internal Learning
useCases.desc: Internal training and micro-learning channels with a regular publishing calendar and role-based content streams.

useCases.title: Supplier Development
useCases.desc: Brand-standard channels for suppliers, delivering development, standard updates, and technical guidance.

useCases.title: Onboarding
useCases.desc: Structured first-30, 60, and 90-day video streams and role-based orientation series for new hires.

useCases.title: Corporate Storytelling
useCases.desc: A regularly published corporate story channel targeting external stakeholders (customers, investors, candidates).
